name: prompt-tuner
description: Standalone HTML prompt tuner: an editable system prompt with {{variable}} slots, a sample input, a live-filled preview, and quality metrics. Interactive template — carries the interactive-template minimal-JS exception: self-contained inline JS re-renders the filled preview from the variables as the prompt is edited, with no external resources.

slots.description: Prompt title; used in <title> and the h1.
The editable system prompt; {{variable}} markers fill from the variables.
A representative input the prompt is tuned against.
The filled prompt preview region; rebuilt live by the demo from systemPrompt + variables.
One legend chip per template variable; the demo fills the preview from these. See shape.
One pill per quality metric (e.g. length, tone, reading grade).
Footer provenance line, auto-filled by the agent.
